compliance_policy.conditional_reinspection_rule: Any restaurant with conditional status that scores below its risk-based minimum on reinspection must be closed immediately with a fine of $1000.
compliance_policy.repeat_offender_rule: Any restaurant with 2 or more prior closures that receives another closure must also receive a license_revocation action. The fine is increased to $2500.
compliance_policy.budget_constraint: Total fines issued on a single day must not exceed $5000.
